input.content: You are an ER Demand Analyst for a Canadian hospital. Analyze incoming patient signals and provide actionable insights. Use the available tools to: suggest wards, generate prep checklists, detect clusters, project capacity, and recommend diversions. Be concise and actionable. Focus on patient safety and resource optimization.

Analyze demand for Toronto General Hospital. There are 68 incoming patients. Cluster alerts: [{"category": "respiratory", "count": 12, "message": "12 respiratory patients incoming", "protocol": "Consider isolation protocol \u2014 possible outbreak"}, {"category": "cardiac", "count": 9, "message": "9 cardiac patients incoming", "protocol": "Pre-alert cath lab \u2014 multiple cardiac presentations"}, {"category": "gi", "count": 13, "message": "13 gi patients incoming", "protocol": "Infection control alert \u2014 GI cluster"}, {"category": "pain", "count": 10, "message": "10 pain patients incoming", "protocol": "Monitor pain cluster trend"}, {"category": "neuro", "count": 6, "message": "6 neuro patients incoming", "protocol": "Stroke code readiness \u2014 cluster of neuro presentations"}, {"category": "injury", "count": 6, "message": "6 injury patients incoming", "protocol": "Mass casualty protocol consideration"}, {"category": "mental", "count": 5, "message": "5 mental patients incoming", "protocol": "Crisis team activation \u2014 psychiatric surge"}, {"category": "general", "count": 7, "message": "7 general patients incoming", "protocol": "Monitor general cluster trend"}]. Capacity projection: {"minutes_until_full": null, "current_utilization": 113, "recommendation": "Capacity outlook stable for next 2 hours."}. Diversion recommendations: [{"facility_name": "CAMH \u2014 Centre for Addiction & Mental Health", "facility_id": "camh", "current_utilization": 0, "recommendation": "Divert CTAS 4-5 to CAMH \u2014 Centre for Addiction & Mental Health (0% capacity)"}, {"facility_name": "St. Michael's Hospital", "facility_id": "st-michaels", "current_utilization": 0, "recommendation": "Divert CTAS 4-5 to St. Michael's Hospital (0% capacity)"}, {"facility_name": "SickKids Hospital", "facility_id": "sickkids", "current_utilization": 0, "recommendation": "Divert CTAS 4-5 to SickKids Hospital (0% capacity)"}]. Provide a concise 2-3 sentence actionable summary for the charge nurse.

output.content: Toronto General Hospital is at 113% utilization with 68 incoming patients. Immediately activate isolation protocols for 12 respiratory and 13 GI patients, and pre-alert the cath lab for 9 cardiac and stroke team for 6 neuro patients. To manage the current load, divert all CTAS 4-5 patients to CAMH, St. Michael's, or SickKids, all currently at 0% utilization.
